feature_name: RFE-8685 — Custom Enterprise CA Bundle Integration

patterns.description: Agent conflates operator ESC API work with upstream SecretStore/ClusterSecretStore CRD or bindata changes
Proxy-gated platform CA behavior (CNO inject) vs enterprise CA independence — A-011 matrix required
Cross-namespace ConfigMap reference in API cannot be mounted directly; requires operand-namespace sync or same-ns constraint
make test-apis requires regenerated CRD manifests before new API field tests pass
CEL validation produces multi-error bracket messages; testsuite expectedError must match repo pattern
CommonConfigs embedded in ESC and ESM causes codegen to update both CRDs when adding appConfig fields

issues.eval_implication: Tasks must pair test-apis with manifests/codegen task or document prerequisite
Code-gen eval for api-generate-tests: negative cases use bracket format when CEL present
Plan must document sync CM or same-namespace requirement
Repo-assessment lists all CRDs embedding CommonConfigs
